name: The Long Quiet (plus voices & Narrator)
description: The Long Quiet is the nascent god from the game, Slay the Princess, created by the Narrator in order to slay the Shifting Mound, who appears to TLQ as the Princess. They're trapped in the Construct looping different ways to slay or save the Princess over and over. The Narrator and all eleven of TLQ's voices are included in this.
creator: Fairyhaven13
